subject_information.address: 230 Tiffany Mountain Suite 863, South Michael, KY 25205

suspicious_activity.narrative: Suspicious activity was identified in the accounts of Michael Stanley (CUST_0062) between 2025-02-13 and 2025-07-29. This activity, including frequent high-value transactions and high average monthly balances, is consistent with money laundering patterns and exceeds the regulatory threshold. Notably, a closed account with a significant balance of $93,306.69 was observed. These actions raise concerns under the Bank Secrecy Act and warrant the financial institution's SAR filing under 31 CFR 1020.320 (BSA) and 12 CFR 21.11 (SAR Filing) as per FinCEN SAR Instructions.
